name: journalism_recall_notice_arrives_redwood_tru_loy
premise: A Journalism response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving journalism recall notice arrives redwood tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is before regulators arrive. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. A whistleblower has already contacted media; the narrative is forming now. Constraints: Preserve evidence under audit and litigation-hold. Make the intervention reversible and time-boxed with named accountability.

agents.name: Jonah Santos
agents.identity: I am Jonah Santos, accountable for a defensible call in Journalism when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Zara Santos
agents.identity: I am Zara Santos, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Journalism.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is before regulators arrive. Evidence is partial. Jonah Santos must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Jonah Santos do?
